searches.name: Top limited route families
searches.query: message:"rate_limit_metric" | stats count() by meta.family, meta.stage | sort -count

searches.name: Repeated offenders
searches.query: message:"rate_limit_metric" | stats count() by meta.offenderRef, meta.offenderKind, meta.family | where count > 2 | sort -count

searches.name: Tenant burst anomalies
searches.query: message:"rate_limit_metric" | stats count() by meta.tenantRef, meta.family | where count > 4 | sort -count

searches.name: Export abuse patterns
searches.query: message:"rate_limit_metric" meta.family:/export|downloads/ | stats count() by meta.family, meta.route | sort -count
